nasb.text: With whom did He consult and who gave Him understanding? And who taught Him in the path of justice and taught Him knowledge And informed Him of the way of understanding?

esv.text: Whom did he consult, and who made him understand? Who taught him the path of justice, and taught him knowledge, and showed him the way of understanding?

cnv.text: 他與誰商議，誰使他有聰明？ 誰把正確的路指教他，把知識指教他， 又把明智的路教導他呢？

ccb.text: 祂请教过谁？ 谁教过祂正道？ 谁教过祂知识？ 谁指点过祂领悟之道？

csbs.text: 他曾与谁商议， 又是谁曾使他有悟性呢？ 谁曾教导他公正的路， 又教导他知识， 指示他聪慧之道呢？
